content.full_text:
April 8, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
John Wallace
Legal Department
428 J. Street
Suite 600
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear John:

This to confirm that on Monday, April 8th you confirmed that an informational pamphlet using the assembly seal and the assemblymember’s picture would not be in violation of the political reform act.

This pamphlet will not be mailed nor distributed door-to-door. This informational brochure will be provided for constituents at a local Sheriff’s Department Community Center. It will also be produced in a number of different languages.

John, I thank you for your assistance on this project and look forward to your response.

Sincerely,

Brenda G. Anaya
